items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Codex How To Start".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=How to get started with Codex link=https://openai.com/academy/codex-how-to-start description=Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance. title=Codex settings published=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/academy/codex-settings description=Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow. title=Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT published=Wed, 22 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-workspace-agents-in-chatgpt description=Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale...
diff_excerpt: description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
-description=Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.
+description=Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
+description=Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.
description=OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
-description=Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
title=Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
description=Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
+description=Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
